title: lonchocarpus oliganthus
intro: Lonchocarpus oliganthus is a plant species, also known as the African dog tooth, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus oliganthus include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions related to inflammation, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve the use of its roots, which are dried and used in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and powders, to extract its medicinal properties.
